# =============================================================================
# FINANCEAIAPP Infrastructure — Serverless Framework v4
# =============================================================================
# Manages: Cognito, S3+CloudFront, Briefing Lambda+EventBridge,
#          CloudWatch Alarms+SNS. All in Seoul (ap-northeast-2).
#
# Deploy:  cd financeaiapp-infra && npm install && serverless deploy
# Remove:  serverless remove
# =============================================================================

service: financeaiapp-infra
frameworkVersion: "4"

provider:
  name: aws
  region: ap-northeast-2
  runtime: nodejs22.x
  stage: ${opt:stage, 'prod'}
  stackTags:
    Project: financeaiapp
    Owner: dongik
    ManagedBy: serverless
    Environment: ${self:provider.stage}
    CostCenter: personal
  environment:
    AGENTCORE_RUNTIME_ARN: ${ssm:/financeaiapp/agentcore-runtime-arn}
  iam:
    role:
      statements:
        - Effect: Allow
          Action:
            - bedrock-agentcore:InvokeAgentRuntime
          Resource:
            - ${ssm:/financeaiapp/agentcore-runtime-arn}
            - ${ssm:/financeaiapp/agentcore-runtime-arn}/*
        - Effect: Allow
          Action:
            - sqs:SendMessage
          Resource:
            - !GetAtt BriefingDLQ.Arn
            - !GetAtt StrategyMonitorDLQ.Arn
        - Effect: Allow
          Action:
            - ssm:GetParameter
          Resource:
            - arn:aws:ssm:${aws:region}:${aws:accountId}:parameter/financeaiapp/slack-bot-token
            - arn:aws:ssm:${aws:region}:${aws:accountId}:parameter/financeaiapp/slack-signing-secret
            - arn:aws:ssm:${aws:region}:${aws:accountId}:parameter/financeaiapp/slack-ops-channel
        - Effect: Allow
          Action:
            - kms:Decrypt
          Resource:
            - arn:aws:kms:${aws:region}:${aws:accountId}:alias/aws/ssm

build:
  esbuild:
    bundle: true
    minify: true
    target: node22
    platform: node
    format: esm
    banner:
      js: "import{createRequire as __cr}from'module';const require=__cr(import.meta.url);import{fileURLToPath as __fu}from'url';import{dirname as __dn}from'path';const __filename=__fu(import.meta.url);const __dirname=__dn(__filename);"
    outExtension:
      .js: .mjs

# =============================================================================
# Lambda Functions
# =============================================================================
functions:
  briefingProxy:
    handler: src/briefing-proxy.handler
    name: financeaiapp-briefing-proxy
    description: "EventBridge → AgentCore briefing invocation proxy"
    timeout: 120
    memorySize: 256
    events:
      # 8:00 AM KST = 23:00 UTC (previous day)
      - schedule:
          rate: cron(0 23 * * ? *)
          input:
            time_of_day: "AM"
      # 6:00 PM KST = 09:00 UTC
      - schedule:
          rate: cron(0 9 * * ? *)
          input:
            time_of_day: "PM"

  strategyMonitorProxy:
    handler: src/strategy-monitor-proxy.handler
    name: financeaiapp-strategy-monitor
    description: "EventBridge → AgentCore strategy monitor (every 30 min)"
    timeout: 120
    memorySize: 256
    events:
      # Every 30 minutes during market hours (KST 09:00-23:00 = UTC 00:00-14:00)
      - schedule:
          rate: cron(0/30 0-14 * * ? *)

  slackPoster:
    handler: src/slack-poster.handler
    name: financeaiapp-slack-poster
    description: "SNS AlertTopic → Slack channel forwarder"
    timeout: 30
    memorySize: 256
    environment:
      SLACK_TOKEN_PARAM: /financeaiapp/slack-bot-token
      SLACK_CHANNEL_PARAM: /financeaiapp/slack-ops-channel
      PROJECT_TAG: financeaiapp
    # SNS subscription wired via CFN resources below
    # (sls `sns` event requires plain ARN string, incompatible with !Ref)

# =============================================================================
# CloudFormation Resources
# =============================================================================
resources:
  Resources:

    # =========================================================================
    # SQS — Briefing DLQ
    # =========================================================================
    BriefingDLQ:
      Type: AWS::SQS::Queue
      Properties:
        QueueName: financeaiapp-briefing-dlq
        MessageRetentionPeriod: 1209600  # 14 days

    # Connect Lambda → DLQ via EventInvokeConfig (CFN native, not SLS syntax)
    BriefingProxyEventInvokeConfig:
      Type: AWS::Lambda::EventInvokeConfig
      Properties:
        FunctionName: financeaiapp-briefing-proxy
        Qualifier: $LATEST
        DestinationConfig:
          OnFailure:
            Destination: !GetAtt BriefingDLQ.Arn
      DependsOn: BriefingProxyLambdaFunction

    # =========================================================================
    # SQS — Strategy Monitor DLQ
    # =========================================================================
    StrategyMonitorDLQ:
      Type: AWS::SQS::Queue
      Properties:
        QueueName: financeaiapp-strategy-monitor-dlq
        MessageRetentionPeriod: 1209600  # 14 days

    StrategyMonitorProxyEventInvokeConfig:
      Type: AWS::Lambda::EventInvokeConfig
      Properties:
        FunctionName: financeaiapp-strategy-monitor
        Qualifier: $LATEST
        DestinationConfig:
          OnFailure:
            Destination: !GetAtt StrategyMonitorDLQ.Arn
      DependsOn: StrategyMonitorProxyLambdaFunction

    # =========================================================================
    # Cognito Identity Pool (Guest/Unauthenticated)
    # =========================================================================
    CognitoIdentityPool:
      Type: AWS::Cognito::IdentityPool
      Properties:
        IdentityPoolName: financeaiapp_pool
        AllowUnauthenticatedIdentities: true
        AllowClassicFlow: true

    CognitoGuestRole:
      Type: AWS::IAM::Role
      Properties:
        RoleName: financeaiapp-guest-role
        AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
          Version: "2012-10-17"
          Statement:
            - Effect: Allow
              Principal:
                Federated: cognito-identity.amazonaws.com
              Action: sts:AssumeRoleWithWebIdentity
              Condition:
                StringEquals:
                  "cognito-identity.amazonaws.com:aud": !Ref CognitoIdentityPool
                "ForAnyValue:StringLike":
                  "cognito-identity.amazonaws.com:amr": unauthenticated
        Policies:
          - PolicyName: financeaiapp-guest-agentcore
            PolicyDocument:
              Version: "2012-10-17"
              Statement:
                - Effect: Allow
                  Action:
                    - bedrock-agentcore:InvokeAgentRuntime
                  Resource:
                    - ${ssm:/financeaiapp/agentcore-runtime-arn}
                    - ${ssm:/financeaiapp/agentcore-runtime-arn}/*

    CognitoRoleAttachment:
      Type: AWS::Cognito::IdentityPoolRoleAttachment
      Properties:
        IdentityPoolId: !Ref CognitoIdentityPool
        Roles:
          unauthenticated: !GetAtt CognitoGuestRole.Arn

    # =========================================================================
    # S3 — Frontend Hosting
    # =========================================================================
    FrontendBucket:
      Type: AWS::S3::Bucket
      Properties:
        BucketName: financeaiapp-frontend-${aws:accountId}
        PublicAccessBlockConfiguration:
          BlockPublicAcls: true
          BlockPublicPolicy: true
          IgnorePublicAcls: true
          RestrictPublicBuckets: true

    FrontendBucketPolicy:
      Type: AWS::S3::BucketPolicy
      Properties:
        Bucket: !Ref FrontendBucket
        PolicyDocument:
          Version: "2012-10-17"
          Statement:
            - Sid: AllowCloudFrontOAC
              Effect: Allow
              Principal:
                Service: cloudfront.amazonaws.com
              Action: s3:GetObject
              Resource: !Sub "${FrontendBucket.Arn}/*"
              Condition:
                StringEquals:
                  "AWS:SourceArn": !Sub "arn:aws:cloudfront::${aws:accountId}:distribution/${CloudFrontDistribution}"

    # =========================================================================
    # CloudFront — CDN
    # =========================================================================
    CloudFrontOAC:
      Type: AWS::CloudFront::OriginAccessControl
      Properties:
        OriginAccessControlConfig:
          Name: financeaiapp-oac
          OriginAccessControlOriginType: s3
          SigningBehavior: always
          SigningProtocol: sigv4

    CloudFrontDistribution:
      Type: AWS::CloudFront::Distribution
      Properties:
        DistributionConfig:
          Enabled: true
          Comment: "financeaiapp frontend"
          DefaultRootObject: index.html
          Origins:
            - Id: S3Origin
              DomainName: !GetAtt FrontendBucket.RegionalDomainName
              OriginAccessControlId: !GetAtt CloudFrontOAC.Id
              S3OriginConfig:
                OriginAccessIdentity: ""
          DefaultCacheBehavior:
            TargetOriginId: S3Origin
            ViewerProtocolPolicy: redirect-to-https
            AllowedMethods: [GET, HEAD]
            CachedMethods: [GET, HEAD]
            Compress: true
            ForwardedValues:
              QueryString: false
              Cookies:
                Forward: none
          CustomErrorResponses:
            # SPA fallback: 404/403 → index.html
            - ErrorCode: 404
              ResponseCode: 200
              ResponsePagePath: /index.html
              ErrorCachingMinTTL: 0
            - ErrorCode: 403
              ResponseCode: 200
              ResponsePagePath: /index.html
              ErrorCachingMinTTL: 0
          PriceClass: PriceClass_200

    # =========================================================================
    # SNS — Alert Topic
    # =========================================================================
    AlertTopic:
      Type: AWS::SNS::Topic
      Properties:
        TopicName: financeaiapp-alerts
        DisplayName: "finance-ai-app alerts"

    AlertEmailSubscription:
      Type: AWS::SNS::Subscription
      Properties:
        TopicArn: !Ref AlertTopic
        Protocol: email
        Endpoint: dongik.dev73@gmail.com

    # Slack poster subscription (CFN native — sls sns event can't use !Ref)
    AlertSlackSubscription:
      Type: AWS::SNS::Subscription
      Properties:
        TopicArn: !Ref AlertTopic
        Protocol: lambda
        Endpoint: !GetAtt SlackPosterLambdaFunction.Arn

    AlertSlackLambdaPermission:
      Type: AWS::Lambda::Permission
      Properties:
        FunctionName: !GetAtt SlackPosterLambdaFunction.Arn
        Action: lambda:InvokeFunction
        Principal: sns.amazonaws.com
        SourceArn: !Ref AlertTopic

    # =========================================================================
    # CloudWatch Alarms
    # =========================================================================
    DailyCostAlarm:
      Type: AWS::CloudWatch::Alarm
      Properties:
        AlarmName: financeaiapp-daily-cost
        AlarmDescription: "Daily AWS cost > $5"
        Namespace: AWS/Billing
        MetricName: EstimatedCharges
        Dimensions:
          - Name: Currency
            Value: USD
        Statistic: Maximum
        Period: 21600  # 6 hours
        EvaluationPeriods: 1
        Threshold: 5
        ComparisonOperator: GreaterThanThreshold
        TreatMissingData: notBreaching
        AlarmActions:
          - !Ref AlertTopic

    BriefingLambdaErrorsAlarm:
      Type: AWS::CloudWatch::Alarm
      Properties:
        AlarmName: financeaiapp-briefing-lambda-errors
        AlarmDescription: "Briefing Lambda errors in last 15 min"
        Namespace: AWS/Lambda
        MetricName: Errors
        Dimensions:
          - Name: FunctionName
            Value: financeaiapp-briefing-proxy
        Statistic: Sum
        Period: 900  # 15 min
        EvaluationPeriods: 1
        Threshold: 1
        ComparisonOperator: GreaterThanOrEqualToThreshold
        TreatMissingData: notBreaching
        AlarmActions:
          - !Ref AlertTopic

    BriefingDLQDepthAlarm:
      Type: AWS::CloudWatch::Alarm
      Properties:
        AlarmName: financeaiapp-briefing-dlq-depth
        AlarmDescription: "Briefing DLQ has messages — failed invocations"
        Namespace: AWS/SQS
        MetricName: ApproximateNumberOfMessagesVisible
        Dimensions:
          - Name: QueueName
            Value: financeaiapp-briefing-dlq
        Statistic: Maximum
        Period: 300  # 5 min
        EvaluationPeriods: 1
        Threshold: 0
        ComparisonOperator: GreaterThanThreshold
        TreatMissingData: notBreaching
        AlarmActions:
          - !Ref AlertTopic

    StrategyMonitorLambdaErrorsAlarm:
      Type: AWS::CloudWatch::Alarm
      Properties:
        AlarmName: financeaiapp-strategy-monitor-errors
        AlarmDescription: "Strategy Monitor Lambda errors in last 15 min"
        Namespace: AWS/Lambda
        MetricName: Errors
        Dimensions:
          - Name: FunctionName
            Value: financeaiapp-strategy-monitor
        Statistic: Sum
        Period: 900  # 15 min
        EvaluationPeriods: 1
        Threshold: 1
        ComparisonOperator: GreaterThanOrEqualToThreshold
        TreatMissingData: notBreaching
        AlarmActions:
          - !Ref AlertTopic

    StrategyMonitorDLQDepthAlarm:
      Type: AWS::CloudWatch::Alarm
      Properties:
        AlarmName: financeaiapp-strategy-monitor-dlq-depth
        AlarmDescription: "Strategy Monitor DLQ has messages — failed invocations"
        Namespace: AWS/SQS
        MetricName: ApproximateNumberOfMessagesVisible
        Dimensions:
          - Name: QueueName
            Value: financeaiapp-strategy-monitor-dlq
        Statistic: Maximum
        Period: 300  # 5 min
        EvaluationPeriods: 1
        Threshold: 0
        ComparisonOperator: GreaterThanThreshold
        TreatMissingData: notBreaching
        AlarmActions:
          - !Ref AlertTopic

    # =========================================================================
    # CloudWatch Alarms — Duration/Throttles (M2)
    # =========================================================================
    BriefingLambdaDurationAlarm:
      Type: AWS::CloudWatch::Alarm
      Properties:
        AlarmName: financeaiapp-briefing-lambda-duration
        AlarmDescription: "Briefing Lambda p95 duration > 100s (timeout 120s)"
        Namespace: AWS/Lambda
        MetricName: Duration
        Dimensions:
          - Name: FunctionName
            Value: financeaiapp-briefing-proxy
        ExtendedStatistic: p95
        Period: 900  # 15 min
        EvaluationPeriods: 1
        Threshold: 100000  # ms
        ComparisonOperator: GreaterThanThreshold
        TreatMissingData: notBreaching
        AlarmActions:
          - !Ref AlertTopic

    BriefingLambdaThrottlesAlarm:
      Type: AWS::CloudWatch::Alarm
      Properties:
        AlarmName: financeaiapp-briefing-lambda-throttles
        AlarmDescription: "Briefing Lambda throttled in last 5 min"
        Namespace: AWS/Lambda
        MetricName: Throttles
        Dimensions:
          - Name: FunctionName
            Value: financeaiapp-briefing-proxy
        Statistic: Sum
        Period: 300
        EvaluationPeriods: 1
        Threshold: 0
        ComparisonOperator: GreaterThanThreshold
        TreatMissingData: notBreaching
        AlarmActions:
          - !Ref AlertTopic

    StrategyMonitorLambdaDurationAlarm:
      Type: AWS::CloudWatch::Alarm
      Properties:
        AlarmName: financeaiapp-strategy-monitor-duration
        AlarmDescription: "Strategy Monitor Lambda p95 duration > 100s (timeout 120s)"
        Namespace: AWS/Lambda
        MetricName: Duration
        Dimensions:
          - Name: FunctionName
            Value: financeaiapp-strategy-monitor
        ExtendedStatistic: p95
        Period: 900
        EvaluationPeriods: 1
        Threshold: 100000
        ComparisonOperator: GreaterThanThreshold
        TreatMissingData: notBreaching
        AlarmActions:
          - !Ref AlertTopic

    StrategyMonitorLambdaThrottlesAlarm:
      Type: AWS::CloudWatch::Alarm
      Properties:
        AlarmName: financeaiapp-strategy-monitor-throttles
        AlarmDescription: "Strategy Monitor Lambda throttled in last 5 min"
        Namespace: AWS/Lambda
        MetricName: Throttles
        Dimensions:
          - Name: FunctionName
            Value: financeaiapp-strategy-monitor
        Statistic: Sum
        Period: 300
        EvaluationPeriods: 1
        Threshold: 0
        ComparisonOperator: GreaterThanThreshold
        TreatMissingData: notBreaching
        AlarmActions:
          - !Ref AlertTopic

  # ===========================================================================
  # Outputs — for frontend env vars and GitHub Actions
  # ===========================================================================
  Outputs:
    IdentityPoolId:
      Description: Cognito Identity Pool ID (VITE_IDENTITY_POOL_ID)
      Value: !Ref CognitoIdentityPool

    FrontendBucketName:
      Description: S3 bucket for frontend deployment
      Value: !Ref FrontendBucket

    CloudFrontDistributionId:
      Description: CloudFront distribution ID (for cache invalidation)
      Value: !Ref CloudFrontDistribution

    CloudFrontDomain:
      Description: CloudFront domain (public URL)
      Value: !GetAtt CloudFrontDistribution.DomainName

    AlertTopicArn:
      Description: SNS topic for alerts
      Value: !Ref AlertTopic
